description: A flight test engineer needs to execute a test plan to evaluate the stall characteristics of a new aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the approved flight test plan, including the specific maneuvers, altitudes, and data collection parameters.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the full test plan.

nodes.task_description: In real-time during the flight, guide the test pilot through the maneuvers while monitoring aircraft telemetry for safety.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear instructions and monitors telemetry for any limit exceedances.

nodes.task_description: After the flight, download the flight data recorder information for analysis.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully downloads and archives the flight data.
